rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:14 83 105 103 104 95 48 49]>If only it were possible to find out what's
inside of this blizzard...<PageBreak>Oh?

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:38 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 95 48 49]>Why, if it isn't Tulin! I was too focused on
the cloud to notice you.<PageBreak>But if you've come here, that means—
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Yep! They said I could go up there!

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>果然沒錯！
我就覺得丘栗你一定辦得到。
畢竟你那自由自在起風的技巧，
從以前就讓大家自嘆不如啊！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>やはり そうだったか！
チューリならやれると オレも<Ruby={2:4}おも>思っていたぞ
<Ruby={2:4}かぜ>風を<Ruby={4:6}じざい>自在に<Ruby={2:2}う>生み<Ruby={2:2}だ>出す おまえの<Ruby={2:4}わざ>技には
<Ruby={4:6}いぜん>以前から みんなが<Ruby={6:10}いちもくお>一目置いていたんだ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>I knew it! Something told me you were the
best one for this mission.<PageBreak>Everyone has admired your wind-gust
technique since you first demonstrated it.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>眼下这种糟糕的天气，利特族里面
大概也只有你才能飞到云上调查了！
加油啊，
我等你的好消息！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>有辦法在目前這種惡劣的天氣中飛到雲層上調查的，
在利特族當中大概也只有你了吧！
加油啊，
我等你的報告！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>いまの<Ruby={2:2}あ>荒れた<Ruby={2:4}そら>空で <Ruby={2:4}くも>雲の<Ruby={2:4}うえ>上に<Ruby={4:8}ちょうさ>調査へ<Ruby={2:2}い>行けるのは
リト<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中でも おまえくらいだろう ってな
がんばってくれよ
おまえの<Ruby={4:8}ほうこく>報告を<Ruby={2:2}ま>待ってるからな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>You may be the only Rito capable of
rising above that cloud to find the truth
among the turbulent skies.<PageBreak>Give it your best shot. I'll be here
watching for your return.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>ありがとう！

オイラ きっと<Ruby={4:6}きたい>期待に<Ruby={2:4}こた>応えてみせるよ
リンクと<Ruby={4:6}ふたり>2人で <Ruby={2:6}ちから>力を<Ruby={2:2}あ>合わせて！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Thanks! Between Link and me, you won't
be disappointed!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>あの<Ruby={2:4}くも>雲の<Ruby={2:4}うえ>上で いったい<Ruby={2:4}なに>何が<Ruby={2:2}お>起きているのか…

その<Ruby={2:2}め>目で しっかり<Ruby={4:6}みきわ>見極めてきてくれ
<Ruby={4:6}きたい>期待しているぞ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:26 85 110 100 101 114 115 116 97 110 100 95 48 48]>Just what could be happening above
that thunderhead?<PageBreak>Of us all, you may be the best suited to
find out. I believe in you.

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>I promise I'll get it done. The two of us
are gonna see this through!
